summary: Pi bridge-only: narrate + 2 interleaved MCP echo_contract calls, streamed live from pi markers
review_criteria: proper formatting — clean segmentation, no run-on/garbled/merged text, no stray control chars or terminal escape codes
human-readable — reads like an assistant working, coherent and natural
correct text <-> tool interleaving order (narration then the tool it describes)
tool calls are the real intended tools (not leaked internal/shell noise where MCP tools were expected)
the final answer is coherent and matches the work performed
real work actually happened (e.g. the file was written to disk)

content_chunks: Calling echo_contract with the first token.
output.streamed_content: Calling echo_contract with the first token.Calling api_bridge_echo_contract with token A_4a0dc7c4.Calling api_bridge_echo_contract with token B_cea332c7.PI_STREAM_A_4a0dc7c4 PI_STREAM_B_cea332c7

issues: Delta granularity: pi's marker stream emits token-level deltas that split mid-token ('...B_cea33' + '2c7.'; final '...cea332' + 'c7'), unlike the block-level (whole-sentence) chunks the transcript adapters emit. The deltas concatenate cleanly (streamed_content is correct), but a consumer must CONCATENATE them — an mcpagent-layer reassembler that '\n'-joins content chunks (StreamAssistantText) would garble pi output by inserting newlines mid-token. Track for the message-modes layer.

Tool name granularity: pi surfaces MCP calls under the generic marker name 'mcp' rather than the specific tool (echo_contract), so distinct_tools is coarse. The call is genuinely the MCP tool (not shell/internal noise), just labelled generically.
agent_review.notes: Streaming contract is met: pi's injected marker stream emitted structured Content + ToolCallStart chunks live (6 content, 3 tool), interleaved with narration, and the real MCP tool executed end to end — both tokens returned (final 'PI_STREAM_A_4a0dc7c4 PI_STREAM_B_cea332c7'). Signed good because the P0 requirement (structured streaming from a real bridge turn) holds; the two issues above are non-blocking granularity characteristics to carry into the mcpagent message-modes reassembly work, not defects in the provider-layer stream.
